headline: Dow to participate at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW) will participate in a fireside chat during the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on Wednesday, March 18 at 8:45 a.m. ET.

headline: Is Dow Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Dow has outshone the broader Nasdaq Composite recently, and analysts continue to seem fairly confident about its future performance.

headline: Assessing Dow (DOW) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Month Share Price Rebound
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Dow Without a single headline event driving attention, Dow (DOW) still offers plenty for investors to unpack, from its recent share performance to the scale of its materials science operations worldwide. See our latest analysis for Dow. Dow’s recent share price performance has been strong, with a 56.16% 90 day share price return and a 50.89% year to date share price return, even though the 5 year total shareholder return is still 24.73% lower.
